# Sabkha Al-Fasl

**Summary**: A man-made wetland and evaporation lagoon located in the Jubail Industrial City.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] studied as a critical habitat for migratory birds and a site of potential environmental risk from trace metals.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] man-made coastal wetland

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The area covers 1300ha with water depth ranging between 1-30 cm. ([[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015, p. 20]])
